query_title: Monty Python's The Meaning of Life

recommendations.title: Absolutely Anything
recommendations.overview: Eccentric aliens give a man the power to do anything he wants to determine if Earth is worth saving.

recommendations.title: Life of Brian

recommendations.title: Monty Python and the Holy Grail
recommendations.overview: King Arthur, accompanied by his squire, recruits his Knights of the Round Table, including Sir Bedevere the Wise, Sir Lancelot the Brave, Sir Robin the Not-Quite-So-Brave-As-Sir-Lancelot and Sir Galahad the Pure. On the way, Arthur battles the Black

recommendations.title: Erik the Viking
recommendations.overview: Erik the Viking gathers warriors from his village and sets out on a dangerous journey to Valhalla, to ask the gods to end the Age of Ragnorok and allow his people to see sunlight again. A Pythonesque satire of Viking life.

recommendations.title: Pirates of the Caribbean: The Curse of the Black Pearl

recommendations.title: The Dinner Game

recommendations.title: Sicko
recommendations.overview: A documentary about the corrupt health care system in The United States whose main goal is to make profit even if it means losing people’s lives. "The more people you deny health insurance, the more money we make" is the business model for health car

recommendations.title: Toni Erdmann
recommendations.overview: Convinced that his daughter has forgotten how to laugh, a father shows up unannounced while she's living abroad and bombards her with outrageous jokes.

recommendations.title: John Q

recommendations.title: Tampopo
recommendations.overview: In this humorous paean to the joys of food, a pair of truck drivers happen onto a decrepit roadside shop selling ramen noodles. The widowed owner, Tampopo, begs them to help her turn her establishment into a paragon of the "art of noodle-soup making"
